description: discovery-agent failed to catch [Currently On-Hold] status and Phase 2 roadmap alignment during the initial round of Issue 386. It proceeded to generate technical specs for implementation instead of parking the task as required by GEMINI.md.
suggestion: Strengthen the Discovery Gate prompt to explicitly require a 'Roadmap & Status Verification' step before any technical planning. Add a specific check for keywords like 'On-Hold' or 'Phase 2' in issue bodies.
